name: Java Minecraft (EchoRuins)
author: contact@echoruins.com
description: Optimised Minecraft server with GraalVM, LeafMC support, and optional NUMA. Supports Leaf, Paper, Velocity, Vanilla, and many other forks via MCJars API.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# EchoRuins Universal Installation Script
# Supports LeafMC (via GitHub API) and other forks (via MCJars API)
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server || exit 1

apt-get update > /dev/null 2>&1
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip > /dev/null 2>&1

SOFTWARE=${SOFTWARE:-LEAF}
VERSION=${VERSION:-latest}
BUILD=${BUILD:-latest}

log_info() {
    echo -e "[INSTALL] $1"
}

# ---------- LeafMC installation ----------
install_leaf() {
    log_info "Installing LeafMC..."
    
    # Map Minecraft version to Leaf project version (e.g., 1.21.8 -> 1.21.8)
    MC_VERSION="$VERSION"
    if [ "$MC_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
        # Fetch the latest Minecraft version supported by Leaf (from API)
        MC_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions | jq -r '.versions | keys | map(select(. != "latest")) | sort | last')
    fi
    
    log_info "Minecraft version: $MC_VERSION"
    
    # Get the latest build ID for that Minecraft version
    if [ "$BUILD" == "latest" ]; then
        BUILD=$(curl -s "https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions/${MC_VERSION}" | jq -r '.builds | max')
    fi
    
    log_info "Build: $BUILD"
    
    # Download the jar
    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions/${MC_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD}/downloads/leaf-${MC_VERSION}-${BUILD}.jar"
    log_info "Downloading from $DOWNLOAD_URL"
    curl -s -o server.jar "$DOWNLOAD_URL"
    
    if [ ! -f server.jar ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Failed to download LeafMC server jar"
        exit 1
    fi
    
    log_info "LeafMC downloaded successfully"
}

# ---------- MCJars installation (for other forks) ----------
install_mcjars() {
    log_info "Installing $SOFTWARE via MCJars API..."
    
    # Use MCJars API (same as original MCJars egg)
    if [ "$VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
        VERSION=$(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v2/builds/$SOFTWARE" | jq -r '.builds | to_entries | map(select(.value.type == "RELEASE")) | last | .key')
    fi
    
    if [ "$BUILD" == "latest" ]; then
        BUILD=$(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v1/builds/$SOFTWARE/$VERSION/latest" | jq -r '.build.id')
    fi
    
    log_info "Software: $SOFTWARE"
    log_info "Version: $VERSION"
    log_info "Build: $BUILD"
    
    bash <(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v1/script/$BUILD/bash")
}

# ---------- Main ----------
if [[ "$SOFTWARE" == "LEAF" ]]; then
    install_leaf
else
    install_mcjars
fi

# Optional: modpack support (if DOWNLOAD_URL is set)
if [ -n "$DOWNLOAD_URL" ]; then
    log_info "Downloading additional files from $DOWNLOAD_URL"
    curl -s -o extra.zip "$DOWNLOAD_URL"
    unzip -o extra.zip > /dev/null 2>&1
    rm extra.zip
fi

log_info "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.

variables.name: Additional JVM Flags
variables.description: Custom JVM flags (e.g., for garbage collection or GraalVM tuning). Use 'Aikar's Flags' or 'Velocity Flags' for presets.

variables.name: Maximum Ram Percentage
variables.description: Percentage of the server's allocated memory to use for the Minecraft heap (default 90%).

variables.name: Minehut Support
variables.description: Enable Minehut Support by adding all required flags to forward player data.

variables.name: Java Agent
variables.description: ADVANCED: Set a custom java agent to use (e.g., SWM).

variables.name: Override Startup
variables.description: ADVANCED: Override the displayed startup command to support all other variables.

variables.name: Automatic Updating
variables.description: ADVANCED: Automatically update your server software to the latest build (only for MCJars software).

variables.name: Remove Update Warning
variables.description: Removes the 20 second Spigot update warning.

variables.name: Malware Scan
variables.description: Run MCAntiMalware scan on startup (requires Java 17+).

variables.name: Software
variables.description: Server software: LEAF, PAPER, VELOCITY, VANILLA, etc. (case‑sensitive). For Leaf, uses Leaf API; others use MCJars.

variables.name: Build ID
variables.description: Specific build ID (e.g., 97 for Leaf, or numeric ID for MCJars). 'latest' uses newest.

variables.name: Version
variables.description: Minecraft version (e.g., 1.21.8, 1.20.4). 'latest' uses newest stable version.

variables.name: MCJars API Key
variables.description: Optional: MCJars API key for authenticated requests (increases rate limits).

variables.name: CurseForge API Key
variables.description: Optional: CurseForge API key for automatic mod downloading (modpack support).

variables.name: Modrinth API Key
variables.description: Optional: Modrinth API key for authenticated requests.

variables.name: Modpack source
variables.description: Source for modpack (curseforge, modrinth). Leave empty to skip.

variables.name: Download file
variables.description: Optional URL to an extra ZIP file to download and extract (e.g., modpack).

variables.name: NUMA Support
variables.description: Enable -XX:+UseNUMA (only if your CPU has multiple NUMA nodes). Disabled by default to avoid errors.
